mapper.insert: insert into wallet_account(account_id, owner_type, owner_id, account_type, balance, status, version) values(#{accountId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{accountType}, #{balance}, #{status}, #{version})
mapper.update: update wallet_account set balance = balance + #{delta}, version = version + 1, status = #{nextStatus}, update_time = current_timestamp where account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=BINARY} and version = #{expectedVersion} and balance + #{delta} >= 0
